body:
🔴 **Tool Issue** — `src/api/usageManagementContext.ts:37`
```ts
const userAgentInfo = `azsdk-js-arm-commerce/1.0.0-beta.1`;
```
The `userAgentInfo` version (`1.0.0-beta.1`) does not match the package version (`4.0.0-beta.4`) declared in `package.json` and `CHANGELOG.md`. This is a version mismatch caused by a generation tool bug.

**Fix:** Update this line to `azsdk-js-arm-commerce/4.0.0-beta.4`, and report the issue in the [generation tool repository](https://github.com/Azure/autorest.typescript/issues).

1 tool issue found.

<details>
<summary>📊 Structured Report</summary>

```json
{"agent":"mgmt-reviewer","pr":37941,"summary":"issues_found","findings":[{"file":"sdk/commerce/arm-commerce/src/api/usageManagementContext.ts","line":37,"issueType":"tool","category":"version-mismatch","description":"userAgentInfo is set to azsdk-js-arm-commerce/1.0.0-beta.1 but package version is 4.0.0-beta.4"}]}
```

</details>

## Next Steps to Merge
Only failed checks and required actions are listed below.

- 🔄 **CI checks in progress**: All ADO build jobs (`Build UnitTest` across windows/macOS/ubuntu/browser) are still running. Review [ADO logs](https://dev.azure.com/azure-sdk/29ec6040-b234-4e31-b139-33dc4287b756/_build/results?buildId=6102865) once they complete.
- 📝 **Draft PR**: This PR is currently in draft state. Mark it as ready for review once CI passes and findings are addressed.
